## Natural Languages

Mother tongue : Dutch

Other:

|         |               |          |         |
|---------|---------------|----------|---------|
|         | Understanding | Speaking | Writing |
| English | +++           | +++      | +++     |
| French  | ++            | \+       | ±       |
| German  | ±             | ±        | \-      |
| Italian | ±             | ±        | \-      |

## Datascience skills

+------------------------+--------------------------+----------------------------+
| ### Computer languages | ### Datascience software | ### Statistical frameworks |
+------------------------+--------------------------+----------------------------+
| \[R\]                  | SQL Server/warehouse     | SPSS                       |
|                        |                          |                            |
| Python                 | Jupyter notebooks        | SAS-Project                |
|                        |                          |                            |
| Scala                  | Jupyter lab              | R-Project                  |
|                        |                          |                            |
| SQL                    | Intellij                 |                            |
|                        |                          |                            |
| SAS code               | Google colab             |                            |
|                        |                          |                            |
| Bash                   | Spark scala              |                            |
|                        |                          |                            |
| C++                    | Tableau                  |                            |
|                        |                          |                            |
|                        | Docker                   |                            |
|                        |                          |                            |
|                        | TensorFlow               |                            |
|                        |                          |                            |
|                        | Git & Github             |                            |
+------------------------+--------------------------+----------------------------+
| ### Cloud              | ### Hardware             | ### Other                  |
+------------------------+--------------------------+----------------------------+
| Microsoft azure        | IoT (eg LoraWAN)         |                            |
|                        |                          |                            |
| Google cloud           | Arduino framework        |                            |
|                        |                          |                            |
| Docker                 | RaspberryPi              |                            |
|                        |                          |                            |
| TheThingsNetwork       |                          |                            |
+------------------------+--------------------------+----------------------------+
